title: Template for Concept Notes (19th Tranche of the Development Account)

fields.label: Relationship to SDGs: targets
fields.guidance: List in ascending order, max. of 10.

fields.label: Expected progress towards the objective and performance measures
Budget summary (thousands of United States dollars)
fields.guidance: Other staff costs, Consultants, Travel of staff, Contractual services, General operating expenses, Grants and contributions, Total.

sections.title: Additional data needed for the fascicle
sections.guidance: Do not change the categories or format.

fields.label: Summary of consultancy requirements (work-months, not work-days)
fields.guidance: Rows: International, Regional, National, Total. Columns: Number of consultants, Number of work-months, Cost (thousands of USD).

fields.label: Quantified deliverables: Seminars, workshops, and training events (# of days)
Quantified deliverables: Technical materials (# of materials)
Non-quantified deliverables: Consultation, advice, and advocacy (included or not)
Non-quantified deliverables: Databases and substantive digital materials (included or not)
Brief description of planned RCO involvement
Other staff costs - GTA (015)
fields.guidance: Temporary assistance to perform tasks, in support of outputs OP#.#. Total cost of GTA for all outputs.

fields.label: Consultants (105)
fields.guidance: International, regional, and national consultants: cost, number of work-months, tasks, and supported outputs.

fields.label: Travel of staff (115)
fields.guidance: UN staff from the lead entity, and staff from other UN DA implementing/collaborating entities: missions, purpose, supported outputs, cost.

fields.label: Staff category (Lead entity / Other UN DA entities)

options: Other UN DA implementing/collaborating entity staff

fields.label: Contractual services (120)
fields.guidance: Description of services, duration, cost of each contract, supported outputs, and recipient country if possible. Total cost of contractual services.

fields.label: General operating expenses (125)
fields.guidance: Communications and other general operating expenses, in support of outputs. Total cost of general operating expenses. (Conference-related costs, including venue rental for trainings/workshops/EGMs, are listed in this budget class.)

fields.label: Grants and contributions (145)
fields.guidance: Workshops/seminars/EGMs, study tours, and grants to implementing partners. Note: cannot cover conference services (interpretation, venue rental); only participant travel costs.

fields.label: Description (title, country, supported output, duration in days, participants)
